sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current bar sizes and purple L-shape
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Colored bars:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['O', 'S', 'Y', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nPurple L-shape:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'p':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nRed dots/crosses:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'r':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
